title: Phlix webhook event catalog
description: Canonical list of webhook event types a webhook subscription may select (consumed by the admin SPA webhook picker and future server-side events[] validation). DISTINCT from the plugin PSR-14 events in Phlix\Shared\Plugin\EventNameMap (those are 'phlix.*' aliases for in-process plugin subscriptions). NOTE: these event types are the supported/styled vocabulary; actual emission of most of them is an unfinished backend gap to be wired in a later phase.

events.label: Playback started
events.description: A user began playing a media item.

events.label: Playback ended
events.description: A playback session finished or was stopped.

events.label: Library updated
events.description: A library scan added, changed, or removed media items.

events.label: Download complete
events.description: A queued download finished and is available.

events.label: Recording started
events.description: A scheduled or manual DVR recording began.

events.label: Recording stopped
events.description: A DVR recording finished or was cancelled.

events.label: Alert
events.description: A server-level alert or warning was raised.

reserved.description: Fired only by the admin 'Test webhook' action; not user-subscribable.
